description: Miami-raised singer-songwriter delivering emotionally resonant storytelling — soulful, honest lyrics that shift from joyful to introspective. Beautifully layered indie folk with hints of R&B soul.
Miami-raised singer-songwriter delivering emotionally resonant storytelling — soulful, honest lyrics that shift from joyful to introspective. Beautifully layered indie folk with hints of R&B soul.

Miami-based singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist rooted in folk, soul, and Americana. A core member of The Wynwood String Band, he has been a fixture of Miami's independent music scene at venues like the Wynwood Yard and the Miami Folk & Indie Festival. His music blends acoustic warmth with heartfelt songwriting that connects naturally with live audiences.

OIGO is the solo project of Venezuelan-born, Miami-based multi-instrumentalist Adrian Gonzalez — best known as a driving force behind the beloved Miami ensemble Suenalo. Performing with a loop station, guitar, keys, and his voice, OIGO crafts groove-forward, genre-fluid original songs that feel both familiar and utterly unique. A South Florida staple for over two decades.
